security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com

bundle.shortDescription: Launcher and update hub for Neko Legends apps
bundle.longDescription: A compact control center for launching local Neko Legends apps and checking their GitHub releases.
